The2024 AAU Junior Olympicsbegin on July 24, just two days before the Summer Olympic Games begin in Paris, as the best young athletes in the country compete in Greensboro, N.C.

The AAU Junior Olympics feature a variety of sports, including swimming, gymnastics and wrestling.

But It all started with track and field.

Some of the best American athletes ever have competed in track and field events at the "JOs" since 1967. The age classifications of athletes range from 8-18 and events include everything from the steeplechase to the pentathlon.

And it's all streaming live on the FloSports family. Here's what to know.

The 2024 Junior Olympics Track and Field competition isstreaming live on FloTrack, MileSplit and the FloSports app.Highlights, replays and breaking news are on both platforms.

All Times Eastern Standard:

FloTrack will be on the ground in Paris for the 2024 Olympic Games. Don't miss our comprehensive coverage of theOlympics by bookmarking this page.

Don't miss all the track and field season action streaming on FloTrack.Check out the FloTrack schedule for more events.

Video footage from each event will be archived and stored in a video library for FloTrack subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.
